name: agent-os
description: Drive the agent-os Windows 11 sandbox VM through the Labby gateway or an already-configured Windows-MCP endpoint. Ships the agent-os skill, a /agent-os status command, and a SessionStart health check.

settings.name: Auto-start the VM if down
settings.description: Set to "true" to let the SessionStart hook SSH to the Docker host and `docker compose up -d` the VM when the Windows-MCP endpoint is unreachable. Requires agent_os_vm_host + agent_os_compose_file. It only starts (never stops) the VM and does not block on the multi-minute Windows boot. Leave "false" to only warn. Note: this starts an already-provisioned server; it does not install Windows-MCP from scratch. Default: 'false'.

settings.name: docker-compose.yml path
settings.description: Absolute path to the agent-os compose file ON the Docker host, used to bring the VM back up. Example: /mnt/cache/compose/windows/docker-compose.yml. Default: '/mnt/cache/compose/windows/docker-compose.yml'.

settings.name: Container name
settings.description: Name of the dockur/windows container running the VM. Example: agent-os-win11. Default: 'agent-os-win11'.

settings.name: Host-forward SSH port
settings.description: Port the Docker host forwards to the guest's sshd (host:PORT -> guest:22). Example: 2222. Default: '2222'.

settings.name: Host-forward SSH target
settings.description: SSH user@host of the Docker host's port-forward into the guest (user@<docker-host-tailscale-ip>). Use this path — NOT `ssh agent-os` — for Tailscale maintenance inside the guest, since it survives `tailscale down`. Example: docker@100.120.242.29. Default: 'docker@100.120.242.29'.

settings.name: Windows-MCP bearer token
settings.description: Bearer token the Windows-MCP server expects (sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'). Stored in secure OS storage, not settings.json. Without it the windows-mcp server will return 401 and no tools will load.

settings.name: Windows-MCP URL
settings.description: Full HTTP(S) URL of the Windows-MCP endpoint inside the agent-os VM, including the /mcp path. This is what the plugin registers as the windows-mcp MCP server. Example: https://agent-os.example.ts.net/mcp. Prefer the VM's own stable Tailscale/MagicDNS name so it follows the VM across Docker hosts. Default: 'https://agent-os.manatee-triceratops.ts.net/mcp'.

settings.name: noVNC URL
settings.description: Base URL of the dockur/windows web (noVNC) UI on the Docker host, for visual debugging. Example: http://tootie:8006. Default: 'http://tootie:8006'.

settings.name: Docker host running the VM
settings.description: SSH alias/host of the Docker host that runs the agent-os-win11 container (for `docker ps`, compose up, etc.). Example: tootie. Default: 'tootie'.

settings.name: VM Tailscale IP / SSH host
settings.description: The agent-os guest's own Tailscale IP (or MagicDNS name) used by `ssh agent-os` for in-guest commands on port 22. Example: 100.109.125.128. Default: '100.109.125.128'.
